# mcp-me — Full Documentation for LLMs

> A community-driven MCP server framework that lets anyone expose personal information to AI assistants via the Model Context Protocol.

## What is mcp-me?

mcp-me is an open-source Node.js CLI tool and MCP server that helps people create a structured digital identity that AI assistants can read. It solves the problem of AI assistants not knowing anything about the user they're talking to.

With mcp-me, users can:
1. Auto-generate a profile from 342+ public APIs (GitHub, Medium, Strava, Duolingo, AniList, etc.)
2. Serve that profile as an MCP server that any AI assistant can connect to
3. Extend with 13 built-in plugins for real-time data (Spotify now playing, GitHub repos, etc.)

## How it works

1. User runs `mcp-me init ~/my-profile` → creates YAML templates + `.mcp-me.yaml` config
2. User edits `.mcp-me.yaml` → uncomments data sources (e.g. `github: octocat`)
3. User runs `mcp-me generate ~/my-profile` → fetches data from APIs, writes YAML files
4. User runs `mcp-me serve ~/my-profile` → starts MCP server on stdio
5. AI assistant connects to the MCP server → reads profile data, uses tools and prompts

## Profile YAML Files

- identity.yaml — Name, bio, location, contact info, social links
- career.yaml — Work experience, education, certifications
- skills.yaml — Programming languages, technical skills, tools
- interests.yaml — Hobbies, topics, music, books, movies
- personality.yaml — Values, traits, MBTI, strengths
- goals.yaml — Short, medium, and long-term goals
- projects.yaml — Personal and open-source projects
- faq.yaml — Custom Q&A pairs about yourself

## MCP Resources

- me://identity — Personal identity and contact
- me://career — Professional history
- me://skills — Skills and proficiencies
- me://interests — Hobbies and preferences
- me://personality — Personality traits and values
- me://goals — Personal and professional goals
- me://projects — Portfolio and projects
- me://faq — Frequently asked questions

## MCP Tools

- ask_about_me — Free-form question about the user using all profile data as context
- search_profile — Keyword search across all profile data

## MCP Prompts

- introduce_me — Generate a 2-paragraph introduction
- summarize_career — Summarize career trajectory
- technical_profile — Describe technical skills and stack
- collaboration_fit — Evaluate fit for a project

## Generator Categories (342+ generators)

### Code & Dev (23)
github, gitlab, bitbucket, huggingface, kaggle, codeberg, codeforces, atcoder, topcoder, projecteuler, codingame, dmoj, kattis, sourcehut, gitea, forgejo, wandb, dagshub, codepen, codesandbox, replit, glitch, observablehq

### Writing & Blogs (15)
devto, medium, hashnode, substack, wordpress, openlibrary, orcid, semanticscholar, youtube, typefully, convertkit, buttondown, wattpad, royalroad, ao3

### Community & Social (26)
stackoverflow, hackernews, mastodon, bluesky, reddit, producthunt, threads, twitter, instagram, tiktok, tumblr, pinterest, discord, telegram, lemmy, lobsters, tildes, facebook, linkedin, wikipedia, meetup, speakerdeck, slideshare, indieweb, webring, signal

### Packages & Registries (11)
npm, pypi, crates, dockerhub, rubygems, packagist, nuget, hexpm, pubdev, cocoapods, maven

### Activity & Tracking (16)
wakatime, letterboxd, goodreads, chess, lichess, codewars, leetcode, lastfm, steam, twitch, dribbble, unsplash, exercism, hackerrank, anilist, strava

### Gaming & Esports (19)
speedrun, retroachievements, boardgamegeek, itchio, rawg, osu, minecraft, roblox, lol, valorant, fortnite, apex, overwatch, csgo, pokemongo, moxfield, dndbeyond, bga, nexusmods

### Music & Audio (18)
soundcloud, bandcamp, discogs, mixcloud, listenbrainz, audius, genius, setlistfm, songkick, rym, ultimateguitar, spotifyartist, splice, beatstars, distrokid, musixmatch, soundtrap, kompoz

### Creative & Design (19)
deviantart, artstation, pixiv, behance, flickr, 500px, sketchfab, figma, canva, shadertoy, society6, redbubble, openprocessing, threejs, vimeo, dailymotion, peertube, adobeportfolio, cargocollective

### Fitness & Sports (19)
strava, garmin, myfitnesspal, peloton, runkeeper, alltrails, parkrun, zwift, komoot, fitocracy, coros, espnfantasy, transfermarkt, sofascore, f1, cricket, marathon, yoga, habitica

### Food & Travel (18)
untappd, vivino, yelp, happycow, allrecipes, cookpad, tripadvisor, nomadlist, foursquare, geocaching, polarsteps, wikiloc, atlasobscura, couchsurfing, beeradvocate, buymeacoffee, whiskybase, openstreetmap

### Learning & Education (19)
duolingo, coursera, edx, udemy, skillshare, codecademy, freecodecamp, khanacademy, brilliant, pluralsight, memrise, ankiweb, italki, lingq, treehouse, researchgate, zenodo, arxiv, googlescholar

### Entertainment (19)
tmdb, trakt, simkl, tvtime, mydramalist, mubi, storygraph, librarything, bookwyrm, mangadex, novelupdates, podchaser, goodpods, pocketcasts, anchor, podbean, zodiac, alignment, hogwarts

### Identity & Personal (20)
gravatar, keybase, polywork, aboutme, personalsite, nowpage, usespage, biolink, pronouns, mbti, enneagram, timezone, languagesspoken, ide, os, keyboard, desksetup, dotfiles, coffeetea, diet

### More Categories
Maker/Hardware (19), Nature (6), Finance/Crypto (19), Productivity (9), Video/Streaming (19)

## Built-in Plugins (13)

1. github — Live repos, activity, languages (optional token)
2. spotify — Now playing, top artists, playlists (OAuth)
3. linkedin — Professional history from data export (local JSON)
4. wakatime — Live coding stats and languages (optional API key)
5. devto — Live articles and reactions (optional API key)
6. bluesky — Live posts, profile, followers (no auth)
7. hackernews — Live stories and karma (no auth)
8. reddit — Live karma and posts (no auth)
9. gitlab — Live projects, MRs, activity (optional token)
10. mastodon — Live toots, profile, engagement (no auth)
11. youtube — Live videos, channel stats (optional API key)
12. lastfm — Now playing, scrobbles, top artists (optional API key)
13. steam — Currently playing, game library (optional API key)

## Tech Stack

- Runtime: Node.js 20+
- Language: TypeScript (strict mode)
- MCP SDK: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
- Validation: Zod
- YAML: yaml (npm)
- CLI: Commander.js
- Build: tsup (ESM + DTS)
- Tests: Vitest (2187 tests)
- Lint: ESLint 9 + Prettier

## Author

Fernando Paladini — https://github.com/paladini
